tldr: Athena, we walked through all 185 of your live ads and the pattern is stark: roughly 70% are recycling two body-copy blocks ('Buy One Get One Free and comes with a welcome kit...' and 'Luxury You Deserve — Handcrafted in Bali...') across image, video, and carousel formats. At whale-tier spend with a 10-day refresh window, you have at least 18 ads sitting at or past day 12 running near-identical copy — which is exactly the cluster Andromeda demotes.

benchmark.context: At whale-tier spend in jewelry/apparel, hero creatives need a fresh concept every ~10 days — roughly 2× faster than the category median of 21 days. Your active set has 34 distinct concept signatures spread across 185 ads, but the top two copy blocks alone account for over half the volume.

ads.headline: BOGO, Discount and Free Shipping! Use Code: STACK
ads.body: Buy One Get One Free and comes with a welcome kit on your first purchase.  ✦  Free Shipping ✦  Easy Returns Handcrafted in Bali Built on three generations.
drivers: This exact 'BOGO, Discount and Free Shipping!' headline + body pairing is running on more than 25 of your live ads — Andromeda treats that whole cluster as one concept and throttles serving
13 days running on a static image with copy unchanged — that's 30% past your whale-tier 10-day refresh window
Landing destination is /collections/all-of-sarda — the same generic catalog page used by ~30 other ads, so retrieval can't differentiate intent

ads.headline: Luxury Sterling Silver & Gemstones, Up to 45% Off
ads.body: Luxury You Deserve — Handcrafted in Bali. High-end design shouldn't be reserved for special occasions. Handcrafted by skilled artisans, each SARDA piece features genuine gemstones and .925 sterling silver.  Shop the collection and save up to 45%.
drivers: The 'Luxury Sterling Silver & Gemstones, Up to 45% Off' block is the single most-duplicated creative on your account — running on 35+ ads as identical copy across image and video format
13 days live, image format, pointing at the same /sarda-favorites collection as a dozen near-twins
Headline carries no specificity — no stone, no piece, no hook — so it competes against itself across every placement

ads.headline: BOGO, Discount and Free Shipping! Use Code: STACK
ads.body: Buy One Get One Free and comes with a welcome kit on your first purchase.  ✦  Free Shipping ✦  Easy Returns Handcrafted in Bali Built on three generations.
drivers: Video format running the identical static-ad body — no motion-specific hook, no sound-on opener, the video is just delivering the same offer copy
13 days at whale-tier means this clip has had time to saturate any reachable cold pool — fresh concepts beat fresh placements here
CTA 'Shop now' on a generic /all-of-sarda landing leaves intent flat — the video's investment isn't being earned back

ads.headline: Designed for Your Daily Routine
ads.body: Tired of jewelry that loses its luster after a month?  Most "trendy" pieces are just plated shortcuts. At Sarda, we provide the solution: Jewelry made slowly, so it lasts longer.  - No plated shortcuts.  - No substitutions.  - Just sterling silver and natural gemstones built to endure.
drivers: This 'Tired of jewelry that loses its luster' opener is your strongest hook on paper but it's now running on 11 ads simultaneously — the cluster eats itself
13 days live with the homepage as the destination — no specific stone, ring, or bracelet to anchor the buyer's next click
Static image carrying long-form video copy — the 'no plated shortcuts / no substitutions' bulleted argument needs motion or close-up texture to land

ads.headline: Save Up to 45% on Handcrafted Gemstone Jewelry
ads.body: SAVING START AT 45% on our Gemstone Collection Handcrafted in Bali by master silversmiths with over 30 years of expertise — each piece is genuine gemstone set in premium sterling silver that's polished with care. Join 5,000+ shoppers leaving ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ reviews — once you wear SARDA, you'll see why. Shop now before your style sells out.
drivers: 'SAVING START AT 45%' has a typo in the body that's now run unchanged for 13 days across multiple variants — small thing, but every micro-friction compounds at this spend
The 5,000+ reviews proof point is your sharpest differentiator and it's buried in paragraph two — most placements truncate before it shows
Same /sarda-favorites destination as 30+ other ads — Andromeda has nothing to differentiate this one's intent signal

hero_concept.hook: The blue-green stone Janyl flew to Bali for.
hero_concept.headline: Ocean's Of Grace, In Chrysocolla
hero_concept.primary_text:
Most jewelry ads sell a discount. This one sells a stone.

Chrysocolla is what happens when copper meets water in the earth — no two pieces share the same swirl. Janyl pairs it with hand-set .925 sterling, finished slowly by silversmiths who've been doing this for thirty years. Built to be worn daily, not saved for a drawer.

The Ocean's Of Grace bundle is live now — free welcome kit and free shipping with your first order.
hero_concept.visual_direction: Tight overhead macro of the Ocean's Of Grace bundle laid on weathered Balinese stone with morning daylight, breathing room top and bottom for ad copy.
hero_concept.fills_gap: Across the live set, almost every ad leads with the offer ('BOGO', '45% off', 'Free Gift') and treats the stone as background. Nothing currently running leads with the gemstone story or the artisan provenance — which is the only angle a 5,000-review brand can defend against drop-shipped competitors at 35× the volume.
hero_concept.image_prompt: A photorealistic editorial product photograph featuring the product from the reference image, styled in a tight overhead macro composition resting on a weathered Balinese volcanic stone slab with small water droplets and a single fern frond at the edge, with soft directional morning daylight from the upper left creating gentle highlights on the silver and bringing out the blue-green swirl of the chrysocolla. Editorial commerce aesthetic, muted earth-tone palette, shallow depth of field, generous negative space. Square 1:1 composition with breathing room top and bottom for ad text overlay. CRITICAL — preserve the .925 sterling silver / handcrafted oxidized silver finish exactly as shown and the natural blue-green chrysocolla gemstone color and matrix patterning exactly as shown — strictly NO gold, brass, yellow, copper, rose-gold, or warm metallic tones, NO color shift on the chrysocolla toward pure blue or pure green or turquoise. STRUCTURE — preserve the exact construction of the Ocean's Of Grace In Chrysocolla bundle: same number of pieces in the bundle, same number and shape of chrysocolla stones in each setting, identical silver bezel and prong work, identical chain link pattern and clasp type, identical band/cuff thickness and any granulation or filigree detail as shown in the reference. Do NOT add or remove pieces from the bundle, do NOT add or remove stones, do NOT change setting style from bezel to prong or vice versa, do NOT swap chain link patterns, do NOT alter clasp type, do NOT modify band thickness or filigree work. Render the product's metal, color, finish, fabric, weave, stones, surface treatment, AND every visible construction detail (silhouette, closures, hardware count, pockets, sleeves, neckline, printed graphics) EXACTLY as they appear in the reference image. Do NOT change the metal type, do NOT shift the color temperature, do NOT introduce tones not present in the reference, do NOT add or remove buttons, snaps, zippers, pockets, straps, or any hardware, do NOT alter the silhouette, do NOT remove or modify printed graphics or text on the garment. IMPORTANT: the 'no text' and 'no logos' items in the NEGATIVE list below apply ONLY to text or logos added as overlay to the photograph itself — text, logos, graphics, prints, and brand labels that exist ON the product in the reference image are part of the product and must be preserved exactly. Premium commerce photography quality. NEGATIVE: no overlay text added to the photograph, no overlay logos added to the photograph, no watermarks, no UI elements, no Facebook interface, no clickable buttons, no faces, no models, no collage, no borders, no duplicate products, no color shift, no metal swap, no silver-to-gold or gold-to-silver conversion, no warm-tone bias on cool metals, no recoloring of fabric or stones, no pattern modifications, no removing or replacing the product's printed graphics, no extra hardware not present in reference, no added pockets or pleats, no silhouette alterations, no design modifications.
hero_concept.reference_title: Ocean's of Grace In Chrysocolla Bundle

next_step.urgency: Seven ads die within 9 days at current pace — refresh window is now.
next_step.headline: Walk the deck with Kyle
next_step.body: We'll go through the BOGO and 'Luxury You Deserve' clusters live and map a 14-day concept refresh plan tuned to whale-tier Andromeda retrieval. Includes the three highest-leverage angles your set is currently missing — gemstone story, founder/Janyl provenance, and a 5,000-review social-proof hero.

method_note: We went through every live ad in your Meta Ad Library and scored fatigue on format, hook, headline, CTA, landing destination, and launch-cluster signals — no account access required, so private metrics like CPM and ROAS are intentionally absent.
